name: property managers managing 5–15 properties tool
description: For property managers managing 5–15 properties, inefficient utility tracking causes high operational costs. We provide weekly utility usage reports instead of manual tracking of utility bills.
problem_solved: High operational costs due to inefficient utility tracking.

locked_fields.primary_problem: High operational costs due to inefficient utility tracking.
